upload.error_room_max_size: A room can hold up to {max} MB in total. The new total would be {current} MB.
upload.error_max_files_remove: You can only upload up to {max} files. Please remove some files and try again.

upload.error_upload: An error occurred during the upload.
download.error: An error occurred during the download.
